description: thin controller with human-readable flash copy
input:
class ProjectsController < ApplicationController
  def create
    @project = Project.new(project_params)
    if @project.save
      redirect_to @project, notice: "Project created. You're all set!"
    else
      render :new, status: :unprocessable_entity
    end
  end

  private

  def project_params
    params.require(:project).permit(:name, :description)
  end
end
